page_content:
Diversity (Two courses/4-6 credits)

Diversity courses may also fulfill a Distributive Studies category:

Big Question (formerly I-Series) (Two

courses, 6 credits)

Double counted with distributive studies

Optional—Experiential Learning

Experiential Learning offers students the opportunity to participate in independent studies fulfilled through internships, research, study abroad, or community-service learning.

Requirements for students under the CORE general education program can be found at ugst.umd.edu.
